<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Reference; /** * Interface for references in {@see \phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\See} */ interface Reference { public function __toString(): string; }
